title: Resident Evil Mod Discontinued
description: A Minecraft mod about Resident Evil 1-5 implemented into Minecraft.
body: This Mod contains stuff from Resident Evil 1-5, for example the Chicago Typewriter. Albert Wesker as an entity, Red9, Handcannon, a First Aid Spray, and RE4 Merchant. I added some Mario related stuff in there, so see the creative menu![This Mod will make your FPS skyrocket on it's own!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87f176fd6f4edd7f5c91c28398987fc94fbac8e5.png) {The FPS will sky rocket without soduim!} The mod is compatible with Soduim, Iris, and others! The Mod is still in early beta, so pin some ideas in the comments. I'll make sure to read them. (Requires NeoForge To Work). (Note This is the final update because i can't use the mod source anymore sorry)
